name: FF_GLOBALS_F
query: SELECT FF_GLOBALS_B_F.GLOBAL_ID GLOBAL_ID, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.BASE_GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.GLOBAL_VALUE GLOBAL_VALUE, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.DATA_TYPE DATA_TYPE, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.LEGISLATION_CODE LEGISLATION_CODE, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, FF_GLOBALS_B_F.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID FROM FF_GLOBALS_B_F WITH CHECK OPTION
